run: if [[ "$*" == *"terraform apply"* && "$*" != *"-auto-approve"* ]] && [[ "$*" != *"terraform plan"* ]]; then echo 'CAUTION: Running terraform apply without reviewing plan first. Run terraform plan first.'; fi
description: Warn when running terraform apply without a prior plan

run: if [[ "$*" == "git push origin main" && -z "${CI:-}" ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main outside CI. Open a PR instead.'; exit 1; fi
description: Prevent direct pushes to main outside CI
